✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

MIDI file read/write: MIDIKit's SMF module — pure-Swift file parsing, so unlike MIDI *I/O* it works on tvOS/watchOS too.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of MIDIKitSMF? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
